steps.t: Sabert is at the entrance of Stangard, ready to prepare for the Easterling attack.
Bingo is just inside the entrance to the outpost of Stangard.
Langhár is just inside the entrance to Stangard.
Sabert has been stunned into silence by the appearance of Landroval, but you need him ready for battle: the Easterlings have begun their attack on Sta…
Bingo has returned from his errands, and is ready to participate in the battle... which is now concluded!
